theorem_statement.scope: S4 zero-thickness equal-magnitude one-parameter theta-star spectrum over the 108 hinge trees
theorem_statement.claim: For every one of the 108 S4 hinge trees, the equal-magnitude theta-star status is classified by the final_records map: full-open to 120 degrees, public-wrapper full-open to 120 degrees, positive jam at t=sqrt(2), or instant jam at t=0.
